english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا ذَا ٱلْمَنِّ وَٱلْجُودِ ، يَا ذَا ٱلْمَنِّ وَٱلطَّوْلِ،
english translation text: O Owner of bounties and benefits

arabic text: يَا مُصْطَفِيَ مُحَمَّد صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He who made a choice of Muhammad to place His trust in him,
blessings of Allah be on him and on his children.
